title: Prohibits the manufacture, sale of distribution of the valdecoxib and its formulation_Section

T ^ ^ . ^ . ^ . ] ildl d=lRll, yy=W «P=|c) MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 25th July, 2005 G.S.R. 510(E).—Whereas the Central Government is satisfied that use of drug formulations containing Valdecoxib are likely to involve certain risk to human beings; And, whereas safer alternative to the drug are available; And, whereas the Central Government is satisfied that it is necessary and expedient to prohibit the manufacture, sale and distribution of this drug in public interest; Now, therefore, in exercise of powers conferred by Section 26-A of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby prohibits the manufacture, sale and distribution of the following drug, with immediate effect, namely:— "Valdecoxib and its formulations for human use" [F.No. 11014/1/2005-DMS&PFA] RITA TEAOTIA, Jt. Secy. 2264 GI/2005 Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
